chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.575 of 2026 Date Order with signature of the Judge FOR HEARING OF BAIL APPLICATION: 1. For order on MA No.3042/2026 (Urgent). 2. For order on MA No.3043/2026 (Exemption). 3. For hearing of bail application. ------------------------------------------------------------- Dated: 23rd February 2026 Mr. Safiruddin Khan Gandapur, Advocate along with Applicants. ------------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Through instant application the applicant, namely, Shahzad Gul and Bilal Gul, both sons of Sher Gul seek protective bail in Crime No.63/2025 for the offence under section 6, 9, 3e, 14 & 15 of the Control of Narcotic Substances Act, 1997 registered at Police Station Hyderabad. Learned counsel, inter alia, contends that the applicants are innocent and have been falsely implicated in this case; that the applicants were not aware about the pendency of this case and recently they have come to know and have surrendered before this Court for protection. Learned counsel further contends that the applicants want to surrender before the Court concerned to seek proper remedy in accordance with law. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicants above named are granted protective bail for a period of eight days from today against solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fifty thousand only) each with P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court, enabling them to surrender before the trial Court. This order shall cease to exist on expiry of 08 days from today viz. 02.03.2026 or on surrender of the applicants before the concerned Court whichever is earlier.

Without touching the merits of the case, the applicants above named are granted protective bail for a period of eight days from today against solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fifty thousand only) each with P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court, enabling them to surrender before the trial Court. This order shall cease to exist on expiry of 08 days from today viz. 02.03.2026 or on surrender of the applicants before the concerned Court whichever is earlier. It is made clear that incase the applicants fail to approach the trial Court within the time prescribed hereinabove the surety furnished before this Court shall stand forfeited. Application in the above terms stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
